title: Updates on Carolingian UI
content:
Version 2.18.x:

  • Scene Nav Layout: Added options to align all subfolders to left, and to disable separation of active scenes.

Version 2.17.x:

  • Disabling Custom Fonts: Added option to disable individual custom font settings.

Version 2.16.x:

  • Enforce Settings to Players You can now apply Carolingian UI settings to players individually using the lock icon beside each setting.

Version 2.15.x:

  • Docking cameras You can drag A/V camera group and dock it above macro hotbar.

If you like this module, consider supporting me on Patreon.

Join the discussion on Discord or visit the Github repository.
